## Test plan

- [ ] `npm test` passes (or `pnpm test`)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New behavior covered by a test
- [ ] Crypto-path changes include a rationale comment citing the RFC section or threat model entry

## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change per PR
- [ ] No `console.log` in source files
- [ ] Immutable patterns used (no input mutation)
